title: What to know about clash between Pentagon-Anthropic over military's AI use

title: Vietnam AI law takes effect, first in South-East Asia
description: HANOI: A law regulating artificial intelligence went into effect in Vietnam on Sunday (March 1), making it the first country in South-East Asia with a comprehensive framework on the booming technology.
content:
HANOI: A law regulating artificial intelligence went into effect in Vietnam on Sunday (March 1), making it the first country in South-East Asia with a comprehensive framework on the booming technology.

title: US fintech firm Block sheds 4,000 staff, cites AI
description: OAKLAND, California - Block, the parent company of the fintech firms Square and Cash App, is laying off 40% of its 10,000 employees, stating plainly that the decision was driven by artificial intelligence.
content:
